strategies.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-primary font-serif
strategies.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-text_main font-serif

surface_strategy.form_container: bg-white border border-[#E8E5DF] shadow-lg rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-10 max-w-2xl mx-auto

components.button_primary: bg-[#2D4A3E] text-white hover:bg-[#3A5E50] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-200 font-medium
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2D4A3E] border border-[#2D4A3E] hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-200 font-medium
components.input: w-full bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#E8E5DF] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#2B2A29] placeholder:text-[#6D6A65] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2D4A3E]/30 focus:border-[#2D4A3E] transition-all

hero_background.description: Sunlight streams through a dense, green forest.
hero_background.usage: Hero section background (with warm gradient overlay for text legibility) or standalone visual.

feature_image.description: Two women in a relaxed therapy session in a modern office setting.
feature_image.usage: Use in 'How it works' or Testimonial sections to show human connection.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use a pure light theme. Strictly no dark mode for this mental health platform. Avoid pure black and pure white where possible; use the tinted earthy variants provided.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or generic sans for headings. Use the designated serif font (Cormorant Garamond).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
The multi-step form is the core UX. Use clear progress indicators and split long forms into single conceptual steps. Keep the 'Talk or type' text area prominent and distinct.
Forms must use Shadcn customized to match the 'Organic & Earthy' roundness and colors. Override default Shadcn borders and focus rings to use the earthy palette.
Implement the layout with high asymmetry and generous negative space (p-12 to p-24) to reduce anxiety and convey calm.
Do NOT use heavy overlays on the hero image; use a soft gradient or off-center layout to maintain image clarity while ensuring text contrast (minimum 4.5:1 ratio).
For the admin dashboard, stick to functional clarity but keep the earthy color accents for buttons/badges instead of generic blue.
Use Lucide-react for icons, with a light stroke-width (1.5) to maintain the soft aesthetic.
